path.description: Can be used by plugins, for example prefixIds.

multipass.description: Pass over SVGs multiple times to ensure all optimizations are applied.

floatPrecision.description: Precision of floating point numbers passed to supporting plugins.

plugins.description: Plugins configuration. Custom JavaScript plugins are not supported in dprint config.

currentColor.description: Current-color matcher. RegExp values are not supported in JSON config.

onlyMatchedOnce.description: Inlines selectors that match once only.

removeMatchedSelectors.description: Clean up matched selectors. Unused selects are left as-is.

useMqs.description:
Media queries to use. An empty string indicates all selectors outside of
  media queries.

usePseudos.description:
Pseudo-classes and elements to use. An empty string indicates all
  non-pseudo-classes and elements.

restructure.description: Disable or enable a structure optimizations.

forceMediaMerge.description:
Enables merging of `@media` rules with the same media query split by other
 rules. Unsafe in general, but should work fine in most cases. Use it on
 your own risk.

comments.description:
Specify what comments to leave:
 - `'exclamation'` or `true` — leave all exclamation comments
 - `'first-exclamation'` — remove every comment except first one
 - `false` — remove all comments

preservePatterns.description: Comment patterns to preserve. Regular expressions should be written as strings.

defaultMarkupDeclarations.description:
If to remove XML declarations that are assigned their default value. XML
  declarations are the properties in the `<?xml … ?>` block at the top of the
  document.

prefix.description: String or boolean prefix. Function prefixes are not supported in JSON config.

includeLegacy.description:
By default this plugin ignores legacy elements that were deprecated or
  removed in SVG 2. Set to true to force performing operations on those too.

className.description: Single class name to add. Dynamic class callbacks are not supported in JSON config.

classNames.description: Multiple class names to add. Dynamic class callbacks are not supported in JSON config.

js2svg.description: Options for rendering optimized SVG from AST.

indent.description: Number of spaces for indentation in SVG output.

pretty.description: Whether to pretty-print the SVG output.

finalNewline.description: Whether to add a final newline at the end of the output.

useShortTags.description: Whether to use short self-closing tags.

onlyMatchedOnce.description: Inlines selectors that match once only.

removeMatchedSelectors.description: Clean up matched selectors. Unused selects are left as-is.

useMqs.description:
Media queries to use. An empty string indicates all selectors outside of
  media queries.

usePseudos.description:
Pseudo-classes and elements to use. An empty string indicates all
  non-pseudo-classes and elements.

restructure.description: Disable or enable a structure optimizations.

forceMediaMerge.description:
Enables merging of `@media` rules with the same media query split by other
 rules. Unsafe in general, but should work fine in most cases. Use it on
 your own risk.

comments.description:
Specify what comments to leave:
 - `'exclamation'` or `true` — leave all exclamation comments
 - `'first-exclamation'` — remove every comment except first one
 - `false` — remove all comments

defaultMarkupDeclarations.description:
If to remove XML declarations that are assigned their default value. XML
  declarations are the properties in the `<?xml … ?>` block at the top of the
  document.

RemoveAttributesBySelectorRule.description: A selector rule for the removeAttributesBySelector plugin.

selector.description: CSS selector used to find matching SVG elements.

attributes.description: One or more attribute names to remove from each matched element.

DprintStringifyOptions.description: JSON-safe js2svg options supported by dprint-plugin-svgo.

pluginDescriptions.addAttributesToSVGElement: adds attributes to an outer <svg> element
pluginDescriptions.addClassesToSVGElement: adds classnames to an outer <svg> element
pluginDescriptions.cleanupAttrs: cleanups attributes from newlines, trailing and repeating spaces
pluginDescriptions.cleanupEnableBackground: remove or cleanup enable-background attribute when possible
pluginDescriptions.cleanupIds: removes unused IDs and minifies used
pluginDescriptions.cleanupListOfValues: rounds list of values to the fixed precision
pluginDescriptions.cleanupNumericValues: rounds numeric values to the fixed precision, removes default "px" units
pluginDescriptions.convertColors: converts colors: rgb() to #rrggbb and #rrggbb to #rgb
pluginDescriptions.convertOneStopGradients: converts one-stop (single color) gradients to a plain color
pluginDescriptions.convertPathData: optimizes path data: writes in shorter form, applies transformations
pluginDescriptions.convertShapeToPath: converts basic shapes to more compact path form
pluginDescriptions.convertTransform: collapses multiple transformations and optimizes it
pluginDescriptions.mergePaths: merges multiple paths in one if possible
pluginDescriptions.mergeStyles: merge multiple style elements into one
pluginDescriptions.minifyStyles: minifies styles and removes unused styles
pluginDescriptions.moveElemsAttrsToGroup: Move common attributes of group children to the group
pluginDescriptions.moveGroupAttrsToElems: moves some group attributes to the content elements
pluginDescriptions.removeAttributesBySelector: removes attributes of elements that match a css selector
pluginDescriptions.removeDimensions: removes width and height in presence of viewBox (opposite to removeViewBox)
pluginDescriptions.removeEditorsNSData: removes editors namespaces, elements and attributes
pluginDescriptions.removeElementsByAttr: removes arbitrary elements by ID or className
pluginDescriptions.removeHiddenElems: removes hidden elements (zero sized, with absent attributes)
pluginDescriptions.removeOffCanvasPaths: removes elements that are drawn outside of the viewBox
pluginDescriptions.removeUnknownsAndDefaults: removes unknown elements content and attributes, removes attrs with default values
pluginDescriptions.removeUselessStrokeAndFill: removes useless stroke and fill attributes
pluginDescriptions.removeXlink: remove xlink namespace and replaces attributes with the SVG 2 equivalent where applicable
pluginDescriptions.reusePaths: Finds <path> elements with the same d, fill, and ' + 'stroke, and converts them to <use> elements ' + 'referencing a single <path> def.
pluginDescriptions.sortAttrs: Sort element attributes for better compression
pluginDescriptions.sortDefsChildren: Sorts children of <defs> to improve compression
